channel.title: MS Graph Registry Updates
channel.description: Real-time notifications for new Microsoft Graph Permissions

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ProtectionScopes.Compute.User
item.description: Allows the app to identify Purview data protection, compliance and governance policy scopes defined for an individual user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrivilegedAssignmentSchedule.Remove.AzureADGroup
item.description: Delete time-based assignment schedules for access to Azure AD groups, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: People.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read a scored list of relevant people of the signed-in user or other users in the signed-in user's organization. The list can include local contacts, contacts from social networking, your organization's directory, and people from recent communications (such as email and Skype).

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IndustryData-DataConnector.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read data connectors on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityIncident.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all security incidents, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ThreatIntelligence.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read threat intellgence information, such as indicators, observations, and and articles, without a signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DeviceManagementRBAC.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the properties relating to the Microsoft Intune Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityEvents.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's security events without a signed-in user. Also allows the app to update editable properties in security events.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Calendars.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read events of all calendars without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: GroupSettings.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete on the list of tenant-level or group-specific group settings objects that you have access to in the organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamworkDevice.Read.All
item.description: Allow the app to read the management data for Teams devices, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows-Reports.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all Lifecycle workflows reports without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Bookings.Read.All
item.description: Allows an app to read Bookings appointments, businesses, customers, services, and staff without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BitlockerKey.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read BitLocker keys on behalf of the signed-in user, for their owned devices. Allows read of the recovery key.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SecurityIdentitiesActions.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write identity security available actions on behalf of the signed-in identity.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AuthenticationContext.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the authentication context information in your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-WindowsHello.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the signed-in user's Windows Hello authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: BusinessScenarioConfig.ReadWrite.OwnedBy
item.description: Allows the app to create new business scenarios and fully manage the configurations of scenarios it owns, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AuditLogsQuery-Entra.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and query audit logs from Entra service, on behalf of a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentIdentity.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all agent identities without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CustomSecAttributeDefinition.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read custom security attribute definitions for the tenant on behalf of a signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentInstance.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all agent instances and their related collections in your organization's Agent Registry without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: eDiscovery.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read eDiscovery objects such as cases, custodians, review sets and other related objects without the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OrgSettings-Todo.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read organization-wide Microsoft To Do settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ExternalConnection.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all external connections on behalf of a signed-in user. The signed-in user must be an administrator.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: eDiscovery.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read eDiscovery objects such as cases, custodians, review sets and other related objects without the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Passkey.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the signed-in user's passkey authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LearningAssignedCourse.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, update, read and delete all assignments in the organization's directory, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CustomTags.Read.All
item.description: Read custom tags data on behalf of the signed-in user

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Mail.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete email in user mailboxes. Does not include permission to send mail.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to read and manage the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, without a signed-in user. This includes instantiating directory roles and managing directory role membership, and reading directory role templates, directory roles and memberships.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrivilegedEligibilitySchedule.Remove.AzureADGroup
item.description: Allows the app to delete time-based eligibility schedules for access to Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Calendars.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read events in user calendars .

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EngagementRole.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to list all Viva Engage roles and role memberships on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ProgramControl.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, update, delete and perform actions on programs and program controls in the organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-TAP.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's Temporary Access Pass authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForTeam.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the resource specific permissions granted on the team without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.SecurityDefaults
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's security defaults policy without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OrgSettings-DynamicsVoice.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide Dynamics customer voice settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: BitlockerKey.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows an app to read basic BitLocker key properties for all devices, without a signed-in user. Does not allow read of the recovery key.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Notes.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read OneNote notebooks on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: OrgSettings-Microsoft365Install.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide Microsoft 365 apps installation settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: BusinessScenarioConfig.Read.OwnedBy
item.description: Allows the app to read the configurations of business scenarios it owns, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IndustryData-OutboundFlow.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write outbound data flowsets and flows on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CustomSecAttributeDefinition.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write custom security attribute definitions for the tenant without a signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-ReferenceDefinition.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write reference definitions without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: HealthMonitoringAlert.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all scenario monitoring alerts, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-WindowsHello.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read Windows Hello authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: User.RevokeSessions.All
item.description: Allow the app to revoke all sign in sessions for a user, on behalf of a signed-in user.
